div.h1:
Advice You Can Trust.
Experience You Can Use.
div.p: Expertise that helps organisations build stronger brands, cultures, and capabilities.

We go beyond traditional consulting by working alongside you to set up, scale and optimize your business. With deep expertise in GCC consulting, people advisory, and digital transformation, MOAR Advisory delivers results that matter.

Headquartered in Bengaluru with a 200+ delivery team through Yitro Global, we blend advisory expertise with hands-on execution to help enterprises establish, operate, and scale global capability centers with measurable outcomes.
End-to-end advisory services for your strategic growth
Simplified entry and scalable operations. We assist companies in establishing foundational frameworks for compliance, finance, and operations in new markets.
Talent and people advisory services for global success. We create strong talent strategies, build leadership and shape company culture for growth.
Strategic recruitment that powers your GCC success. AI-driven insights, practitioner expertise, and dedicated account management.
Strategic communications that shape exceptional workplaces. We strengthen employer brands, attract talent, and deliver measurable impact.
Reimagining technology as a catalyst for enterprise growth. Modern IT architecture with strategic transformation for agility and resilience.
Helping companies set up, scale, and operate with the right insight and leadership in place. Research, planning, and experienced leadership.
Comprehensive GCC solutions tailored to your growth stage
We build and operate your GCC, then transfer full ownership once it's mature and self-sustaining.
A fully managed model where we handle everything from infrastructure to talent, letting you focus on outcomes.
For organizations that want to own the journey but need expert guidance at every step.
We cut through complexity to deliver clear, actionable guidance.
Our practitioners bring deep industry experience you can trust.
Genuine partnerships built on transparency and honest counsel.
We own outcomes and deliver on our commitments, every time.
Our relationships are built on openness and mutual respect.
We work as an extension of your team with hands-on execution.
No templates. Every engagement designed around your unique needs.
Proven frameworks and execution speed to accelerate your timeline.
We assess your needs, understand your goals, and create a strategic plan tailored to your growth objectives.
Our team embeds with yours, bringing expertise and capability to drive implementation at speed.
We ensure sustainable outcomes with ongoing support, knowledge transfer, and capability building.
20+ years at Fidelity, Yahoo, Lowe's, HBC. Builds GCCs and employer brands.
19+ years at KPMG, HBC, Giant Eagle. Fundraising, M&A, compliance.
23+ years in litigation, consulting. GCC and ITeS expertise.
20+ years in global HR. Talent function scaling and team leadership.
15+ years at ING, Marriott, Quess. Brand storytelling and digital strategy.
20+ years in talent acquisition. GCC, technology, banking.
15+ years in employer branding, stakeholder engagement, digital strategy.
15+ years in digital commerce. Hudson's Bay, Swiggy, Bigbasket.

h3.button: What is a GCC and how can MOAR Advisory help?

div.div: A Global Capability Center (GCC) is a strategic offshore unit that drives innovation, technology, and business processes. MOAR Advisory helps organizations establish, operate, and scale GCCs with end-to-end advisory covering setup, talent, technology, and compliance.

h3.button: What industries does MOAR Advisory serve?

div.div: We serve retail, manufacturing, financial services, healthcare, aviation, and technology sectors — bringing deep domain expertise to each engagement.

h3.button: How does MOAR Advisory differ from traditional consulting firms?

div.div: We are practitioners, not consultants. Our team embeds with yours and drives hands-on execution — not just recommendations.

h3.button: How does MOAR Advisory offer advisory & GCC integrated services?

div.div: We provide a full spectrum of services from feasibility studies and location advisory through to company setup, talent acquisition, employer branding, and technology transformation — all integrated under one advisory partnership.

div.p: Talk to our experts and explore faster ways to scale your business.
Advice You Can Trust, Experience You Can Use.

MOAR Advisory is built by senior practitioners who have led transformation across industries, startups, and Fortune 500 companies. Headquartered in Bengaluru with a 200+ delivery team through Yitro Global, we blend advisory expertise with hands-on execution.
Our focus is helping enterprises establish, operate, and scale global capability centers (GCCs) into strategic hubs that drive innovation — not just efficiency.
North America operations
Global headquarters
South India operations
Southeast Asia operations
Let's build something exceptional together.
Senior practitioners driving transformation across industries
With 20+ years of experience at Fidelity, Yahoo, Lowe's, and HBC, Mohith specializes in building GCCs and employer brands that drive organizational growth.
19+ years of experience at KPMG, HBC, and Giant Eagle with deep expertise in fundraising, M&A, compliance, and financial strategy.
23+ years in litigation and consulting. ICSI member with deep expertise in GCC legal frameworks and ITeS regulations.
20+ years in global HR with expertise in talent function scaling, team leadership, and organizational development.
15+ years at ING, Marriott, and Quess with expertise in brand storytelling, digital strategy, and employer brand marketing.
20+ years in talent acquisition across GCC, technology, and banking sectors.
15+ years of experience in employer branding, stakeholder engagement, and digital communications strategy.
15+ years in digital commerce and marketplace operations at Hudson's Bay, Swiggy, and Bigbasket.
We're always looking for exceptional talent.
Simplified Entry. Scalable Operations.
Organizations entering new markets require swift compliance and structured operations. We assist companies in establishing foundational frameworks, enabling immediate growth focus.
Entity structuring, registration, and incorporation adapted to operational models and jurisdictional requirements.
Fulfillment of local legal and regulatory obligations, including licensing, filings, and governance structures.
Finance functions, accounting systems, reporting frameworks, and internal control mechanisms.
Strategic tax structuring and continuous advisory addressing compliance, efficiency, and risk mitigation.
Corporate bank account establishment, treasury operations, and initial capital configuration.
Procurement processes from vendor onboarding through sourcing and spend management.
Deploying core platforms supporting finance, procurement, and compliance operations.
Post-setup advisory and execution across finance, tax, and compliance for stability and expansion.
Organizations entering new geographies and establishing capability centers.
Requiring expert guidance from trusted advisors for initial operations.
Seeking comprehensive advisory and global services for growth and scaling.
Launching new entities, business units, or functions.
Talk to our experts and explore faster ways to scale your business.
Talent and People Advisory Services for Global Success
The success of any organization starts with its people. We work with businesses to create strong talent strategies, build leadership and shape company culture for growth.
Workforce planning aligned to business growth goals. Talent strategy for scaling teams across markets.
EVP development for talent attraction. Talent engagement and recruitment marketing.
Culture design aligned to business strategy and values. Change management for transformations.
HR operating model design for scaling organizations. Digital enablement of HR processes.
Personalized one-on-one coaching for founders, CXOs, and senior leaders.
Talk to our experts and explore faster ways to scale your business.
Strategic Recruitment That Powers Your GCC Success
M-SELECT redefines recruitment for Global Capability Centers. By combining AI-driven insights, practitioner expertise, and dedicated account management, we deliver the right talent every time.
Accelerate high-impact teams in tech, analytics, and operations with targeted talent mapping and acquisition strategies.
Deliver a personalized candidate journey powered by subject matter experts who understand your industry and culture.
Elevate your employer brand to attract and retain top talent through authentic storytelling and strategic positioning.
Intelligent, fully aligned with your business goals — from talent mapping to onboarding. Build smarter teams and drive growth.
Talk to our experts and explore faster ways to scale your business.
Strategic Communications That Shape Exceptional Workplaces
We partner with organizations to strengthen employer brands, attract and retain talent, and deliver measurable impact through strategic communications.
Building your reputation as an employer of choice. EVP creation and activation, recruitment marketing, DEI integration.
Define and elevate your corporate identity. Brand audits, positioning frameworks, visual identity guidelines.
Product launches and market entries. Messaging strategy, stakeholder communication, PR outreach.
SEO, content marketing, social media strategy, thought leadership, event marketing.
Workforce alignment and inspiration. Leadership messaging, culture-building campaigns.
Talk to our experts and explore faster ways to scale your business.
Reimagining Technology as a Catalyst for Enterprise Growth
We help organizations build strong digital and infrastructure foundations. Combining modern IT architecture with strategic transformation to drive agility, resilience, and long-term value.
Design, implement, and manage IT environments supporting global collaboration and business continuity.
Public, private, and hybrid cloud strategy. Network optimization. Infrastructure governance and compliance.
Move from siloed approaches to product-centric operating models. Scaled Agile and DevOps adoption.
Operational continuity planning, technology portfolio rationalization, and value stream mapping.
Talk to our experts and explore faster ways to scale your business.
The Right Insight and Leadership for Growth
We support organizations at various growth stages — from early-stage startups entering new markets to established businesses building regional hubs.
Market validation before expansion — cost analysis, talent availability, legal risk identification, and scalability evaluation.
Geographic expansion guidance including city/country comparative analysis, local compliance, and ecosystem partnerships.
Interim executive support for market entry — office management, team building, operations setup.
Practical, market-grounded counsel across industries. Execution support with leadership experience.
Talk to our experts and explore faster ways to scale your business.
Driving Growth Through Strategic Advisory
A global leader in packaging sought to establish a GCC to drive digital transformation and technology innovation.
Comprehensive GCC setup enabling a global manufacturer to build a high-performance capability center.
Improved inventory management and operational efficiency through strategic GCC establishment.
Developed a comprehensive digital strategy driving technology modernization and customer experience transformation.
Designed people advisory programs that significantly improved staff retention and organizational culture.
Streamlined flight operations and technology infrastructure, improving efficiency and scalability.
Partner with MOAR Advisory to drive measurable outcomes.
Conversations That Shape Decisions
Our flagship podcast series exploring GCC strategy, leadership, and the future of global capability centers.
Deep dives into trends shaping business advisory, people strategy, and digital transformation.
Expert discussions, webinar recordings, and thought leadership videos from our leadership team.
Join our leadership for an insightful session on the evolving GCC landscape.
Follow us for the latest insights and updates.
